current_run.problem_name: Hidden XOR Sum of Rotated Quadratic Terms
current_run.description: Given an oracle that computes f(x) = (x_N-1 x_0 + x_N-2 x_1 + ... + x_0 x_N-1) XOR (s . x), where s is a secret bitstring and '+' denotes XOR, find the secret s. This problem combines a cyclic quadratic term with a linear term, making it non-trivial.
